titleStmt.title: SII 11.202: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 202. (B.K. No. 49 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE KĀŚĪVIŚVANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva; but it is not dated. The village Lokkiguṇḍi and its One-Thousand Mahājanas are praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . gaṇapatayē namaḥ
namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇakaṇā yetē © sarasvatyai namaḥ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha māna caṁdrārkkatāraṁ ttamire .
yamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇa japasamādhiśīḷa saṁpanna rssamasta guṇagaṇā
ta rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhritāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarīra rcca turvvēdapāraga raṣṭā
kya racaḷitadhairyyasthairyyaparākrama rāśritajanakalpavrikṣa rahitapakṣa kṣaya
rāhavadhurandhara rssāpānugrahasamarttha rkkāryyabṛhaspati ga ḷēkaika
kīrttimanōhara rppāpabhīrugaḷu paranārī dūra rdduṣṭavidhvamsaka rvviśiṣṭajanāśraya rkkāmakrō
dhalōbhamōha rdvātriṁśatsahasrasamayā dvijakuḷatiḷaka rśśaraṇāgatavrajapaṁjara rssa
mastaguṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa . śrīrāmaradatti mahāgrāmaṁ śrīmallokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeya pramukha mahā
janaṁ śrīsāsirvvaruṁ samastagōle gōbrāhmaṇa rmmodalāgi sabālavriddharnneredu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadim rakṣisutta mire ©
© sarasijayōni ṟiya lkamarāvati lokkiguṁḍi yeṁberaḍuma neyde tūgala marāvati muṭṭidudū
rdhva dharayoḷu lokkiguṁḍi nelasittene baṇniparā rjaga kkaḷaṁkarisuva lokkiguṇḍiya mahatvamumam
doravetta rccārucāritra raṁburuha dbhavasaṁnibharvviThe rest is broken and lost.
Digital edition of SII 11.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
